---
title: "analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
ggplot(
  filter(clean_data, name == "LEU1"),
  aes(rate, expression, color = nutrient)) +
geom_line()

```

```{r}
ggplot(
  filter(clean_data, BP == "leucine biosynthesis"),
  aes(rate, expression, color = nutrient)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~name)

```

```{r}
ggplot(
  data = clean_data[1:6,],
  aes(rate, expression, color = nutrient)) +
geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")

```
